caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hooded sweatshirt with the text "BOSS" in gold lettering, and a gold watch and necklace is seated in a studio setting. He is wearing professional headphones and is positioned in front of a black broadcast microphone mounted on a boom arm. The background features a white wall with gold stars and the word "HUSTLE" repeated several times. A blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right, a black container sits on a table, and a logo reading "TALK OUT" is visible in the lower corners. The man remains relatively still across the sequence, maintaining a consistent posture and facial expression while looking off-camera to his right. There are no significant changes in his movements, the lighting, or the placement of objects between the frames.
